overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a vibrant autumn forest along a dirt trail. The character moves steadily through dense foliage with red and gold leaves, passing rocky hillsides and eventually reaching a riverside path before stopping to look up at sun rays filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs steadily along the winding dirt path, navigating between rocky terrain and colorful autumn trees

entered.detail: reddish-brown rocky slope covered with sparse vegetation rising alongside the path
dense canopy of trees with vibrant red, orange, and yellow autumn leaves
narrow winding trail covered with dry leaves and dirt
low stone wall running parallel to the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running along a narrow dirt trail through a rocky autumn forest. A reddish hillside rises on the right while colorful trees with red and gold foliage line both sides of the path. Low stone walls appear intermittently on the left as the character maintains a steady running pace through the natural terrain.

events.description: river becomes visible through the trees on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues running as the path curves gently left, revealing water through the tree line

entered.detail: calm river visible through gaps in the trees, reflecting the autumn foliage
low bushes with bright red leaves lining the riverbank

segments.scene_description: As Aloy progresses, the rocky terrain gives way to a denser forest section with a river emerging on the left. The path curves gently, revealing water glimpses through vibrant red undergrowth. The tree canopy becomes thicker overhead, creating a tunnel-like effect with dappled sunlight filtering through the autumn leaves.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with mountain view

events.description: character stops running and camera tilts upward to look at the sky

agents.ego_description: Aloy slows to a halt and gazes upward at the sun rays filtering through the tree canopy

entered.detail: tall misty mountains visible in the background beyond the tree line
bright god rays streaming down through gaps in the clouds and trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider clearing with distant mountains visible through the trees. Aloy continues along the path before coming to a complete stop around the 50-second mark. The camera tilts upward to reveal dramatic sun rays piercing through the clouds above, illuminating the vibrant autumn canopy from below as the character looks up at the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rocky autumn forest that gradually opens into a sunlit riverside clearing. It begins with Aloy running along a narrow dirt trail flanked by a reddish hillside and intermittent stone walls amidst red and gold foliage. As she progresses, the rocky terrain shifts into a denser forest where the path curves to reveal a river flowing through vibrant red undergrowth beneath a thick, dappled canopy. The scene then expands into a wider clearing with distant mountains visible through the trees before Aloy comes to a complete stop. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal dramatic sun rays piercing through the clouds and illuminating the autumn canopy from below.
